original: The wetraxxel is a towering, insectile man -- easily ten feet tall, and covered in chitinous plates. A pair of small insectile feelers adorn his head, over small black eyes and a pair of slits for nostrils. His mouth is a four-part set of sharply fanged mandibles, which click quietly as his grunts and growls. He’s monstrously broad-shouldered, with lighter-colored and more flexible plates on his chest; his gut is an off-white against the midnight black of his other chitin. His plated fists are raised to you in a classic boxing stance, ready to punch and block in equal measure.\n\nThe wetraxxal male’s naked save for a simple loincloth which barely conceals a hefty-looking package, certainly sizable even for its owner’s great height.

original: Looking down at you with a scowl, the wetraxxel cracks his knuckles and lumbers forward. You try and scramble back, but find him much swifter from this position. After a moment of self-assured leering, the wetraxxel lunges forward with a leap, and drops down elbow-first on you!

After a moment of self-assured leering, the wetraxxel lunges forward with a leap, and drops down elbow-first on you!",null,t...

original: You manage to twist out of the way, letting him elbow-drop the floor. Oof, that’s gotta hurt!
context: <<POS:02001178>> combatAppend(" You manage to twist out of the way, letting him elbow-drop the floor. Oof, that’s gotta hurt!")

original: He drops down on you like a hammer, cracking his elbow right into your gut! You cry out as the massive blow connects, leaving your writhing in pain.
context: <<POS:02001290>> combatAppend(" He drops down on you like a hammer, cracking his elbow right into your gut! You cry out as the massive blow connects, leaving your writhing in pain.")

original: The wetraxxel stomps his feet, pounds his chest, and comes rushing at you with a blood-curdling battle-roar. He tucks one of his shoulders and rushes at you, trying to slam into you with the whole weight of his body behind him!
context: <<POS:02001599>> combatOutput("The wetraxxel stomps his feet, pounds his chest, and comes rushing at you with a blood-curdling battle-roar. He tucks one of his shoulders and rushes at you, trying to slam into you with the whole weight of his body behind him!",null,this)

original: You side-step the incoming attack, letting the brawler’s charge carry him straight past you. He only just manages to slow himself down before slamming into a wall himself.
context: <<POS:02001874>> combatAppend(" You side-step the incoming attack, letting the brawler’s charge carry him straight past you. He only just manages to slow himself down before slamming into a wall himself.")

original: The brawler body-slams you at full force, crashing into your [pc.chest] with rib-cracking impact! You’ll be feeling that for days!
context: <<POS:02002064>> combatAppend(" The brawler body-slams you at full force, crashing into your [pc.chest] with rib-cracking impact! You’ll be feeling that for days!")

original: The wetraxxel rushes at you, thrusting his arm out to the side and twisting his body, catching you in a clothesline!
context: <<POS:02002353>> combatOutput("The wetraxxel rushes at you, thrusting his arm out to the side and twisting his body, catching you in a clothesline!",null,this)

original: You manage to keep your footing, blocking the worst of the brawler’s strike.
context: <<POS:02002538>> combatAppend(" You manage to keep your footing, blocking the worst of the brawler’s strike.")

original: His forearm catches you right on the chin, and the weight of the brawler’s body slams you into the ground. You feel the weight of the world slam into the back of your head, rattling you to your core. You’re knocked down!
context: <> combatAppend(" His forearm catches you right on the chin, and the weight of the brawler’s body slams you into the ground. You feel the weight of the world slam into the back of your head, rattling you to your core. You’re knocked down!")

original: You duck the attack, letting his weight carry him over your head and into the wall!

original: His feet slam into your [pc.chest], knocking the wind out of you and sending you stumbling back. It’s agony to catch your breath after that, and you find yourself clutching at your chest, wheezing painfully. Your aim and reflexes are temporarily reduced while you catch your breath.

original: The brawler bug swings at you, making you duck back - and immediately follows up by ducking down and trying to sweep your [pc.legs] out from under you.
context: <<POS:02003806>> combatOutput("The brawler bug swings at you, making you duck back - and immediately follows up by ducking down and trying to sweep your [pc.legs] out from under you.",null,this)

original: You dodge the strike, leaping back out of the way.

original: His kick strikes you, hard, but due to your bestial anatomy, you’re hardly affected in any way but for a sharp sting from the impact. He hits like a truck!
context: <<POS:02004093>> combatAppend(" His kick strikes you, hard, but due to your bestial anatomy, you’re hardly affected in any way but for a sharp sting from the impact. He hits like a truck!")

context: <<POS:02004325>> combatAppend(" The kick takes you completely by surprise, momentarily throwing you off balance and almost tumbling to the ground. You grunt as you narrowly manage to stay upright.")

original: The kick takes you completely by surprise, throwing you off your feet and sending you tumbling to the ground. You grunt as the wind’s knocked out of you, narrowly avoiding cracking your head on a sharp stone nearby. You’re knocked down!
context: <> combatAppend(" The kick takes you completely by surprise, throwing you off your feet and sending you tumbling to the ground. You grunt as the wind’s knocked out of you, narrowly avoiding cracking your head on a sharp stone nearby. You’re knocked down!")

original: You’re thrown off balance by the force of the first punch, leaving you wide open for a thunderous blow that makes you see stars. You cry out in pain, staggering until you slump up against the cavern wall. Ouch!
